stemHtml: How can an air traffic control unit determine the position of an aircraft without the use of radar?

options.a: By using auto-triangulation provided from several VDF bearings from a single station.
options.b: Auto-triangulation provided from several VOR bearings from a single station is used.
options.c: By using auto-triangulation provided from several VDF bearings from different stations.
options.d: VHF NAV frequencies are used to calculate the position of the aircraft by triangulation.
